summary: Final reviewed head passes hotspot, core lint, typecheck, format, schema, docs, routing, and focused loop gates; the executable runtime was split without behavioral drift.
findings: loop.command.ts is reduced from 821 to 499 lines; executable TDD runtime is isolated in loop.execute.ts.
All prior review fixes and regressions remain intact.
residual_risks: Only tdd.fix is executable end-to-end; other built-ins remain fail-closed.
